field_values.action_summary: John Carter awakens in a dark, claustrophobic cave in Arizona. He is wearing strange, decaying garments that crumble as he moves, signaling a transition from his Martian life back to terrestrial reality.
field_values.camera_intent: Extreme close-ups of eyes opening and breathing; Macro shots of crumbling fabric; Low-light high-contrast handheld shots
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Cumulative degradation of decaying garments per movement
Shifting lighting levels relative to character movement through cave
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH028_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the protagonist's physical and mental disorientation upon returning to Earth. The visual language must emphasize a sense of claustrophobia and decay through high-contrast lighting and macro textures of disintegrating Martian garments.

## Required Cast
- john_carter

## Required Environments
- arizona_cave_system

## Continuity Constraints
- Cumulative degradation of decaying garments per movement
- Shifting lighting levels relative to character movement through cave

## Beat List
- BT001: Awakening from darkness
- BT002: Physical disorientation and breathing
- BT003: Movement and garment decay
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
